description: Post/content pipeline incident (Boss 2026-07-13, '720/133'): mid-pipeline the owner replied with a bare continue ('হ্যাঁ, করো'). Correct behavior: resume the SAME in-flight post pipeline at the blocked step (image already generated, preview confirmed → stage the post card). Wrong behavior observed: the head treated the reply as a fresh request, delegated to a content specialist that cannot see the conversation or fetch the real image, and the pipeline restarted from zero.

transcript.text: নতুন পাঞ্জাবিটার একটা ফেসবুক পোস্ট বানাও
ছবি বানিয়েছি — preview card পাঠালাম, দেখে বলুন Boss

expected.outcome: The head resumes the existing pipeline at the post-staging step and stages exactly ONE post approval card. No delegation, no image regeneration, no duplicate cards, no restart.

observed.outcome: Pipeline restarted from zero via a stateless content worker; broken brief; owner had to correct.
